summary: Completed end-to-end testing of MLB Engine Corrections C1 (Eastern Time), C2 (Cache Validation), and C3 (Pipeline Meta). All 45 tests passed successfully. The MLB Stats API is working correctly and returned 15 games for 2026-05-29 (Eastern today). The engine processed 8 games, found 5 rescued picks, and discarded 3. All three corrections are working as designed.
passed_tests: C1: EASTERN constant defined and correct (America/New_York)
C1: analyze_mlb_day uses EASTERN for default date computation
C1: mlb_stats_api imports and uses EASTERN
C2: Code validates cached games by gameDate
C2: Code converts gameDate to Eastern for validation
C2: All 4 cache statuses implemented (hit_valid, hit_invalid_refetched, miss, error)

C3: pipeline_meta contains all 14 required fields (date_str, date_basis, schedule_games_found, confirmed_games, games_processed, dropped_past_or_finished, dropped_missing_pitchers, dropped_low_pitcher_data, picks_total, rescued_total, discarded_total, cache_status, source_used, abort_reason)
C3: Real MLB data processed: 15 games found, 14 confirmed, 8 processed, 5 rescued, 3 discarded
C3d: _run_analysis_pipeline builds pipeline_meta with all required fields
Regression: All 3 signals emit correctly (PITCHER_NOT_CONFIRMED, IL_DEPTH_RISK, MLB_COM_FALLBACK_USED)

key_validations: EASTERN constant correctly defined as America/New_York
DEFAULT_SEASON uses Eastern time (2026)
analyze_mlb_day defaults to Eastern today when date_str is empty
pipeline_meta.date_basis correctly returns 'America/New_York'
date_str matches Eastern today (2026-05-29)
mlb_stats_api imports and uses EASTERN timezone
LAST_SCHEDULE_CACHE_STATUS ContextVar exists and is used
Code validates cached games by converting gameDate to Eastern
All 4 cache statuses are implemented: hit_valid, hit_invalid_refetched, miss, error
get_schedule_with_probables correctly sets cache_status (returned 'miss' in test)
Cache validation prevents games from wrong date being returned
analyze_mlb_day always returns pipeline_meta

All 14 required fields present: date_str, date_basis, schedule_games_found, confirmed_games, games_processed, dropped_past_or_finished, dropped_missing_pitchers, dropped_low_pitcher_data, picks_total, rescued_total, discarded_total, cache_status, source_used, abort_reason
Past date (2025-08-01) correctly returns abort_reason='no_probable_pitchers_all_sources'
Real MLB data processed successfully: 15 games found, 14 confirmed, 8 processed, 5 rescued, 3 discarded
Zero picks/rescued scenario handled with abort_reason
_run_analysis_pipeline builds pipeline_meta
All required fields present: date_str, date_basis, abort_reason
pipeline_meta included in result returned by POST /api/analysis/run
Backend service running (200 OK)
/api/mlb/day endpoint responds (401 - auth required, expected)
All 3 signals still emit correctly: PITCHER_NOT_CONFIRMED, IL_DEPTH_RISK, MLB_COM_FALLBACK_USED
